caption: A news broadcast features a split-screen layout. On the left is a male news anchor wearing glasses, a dark suit, and a red tie, positioned against a blue graphic backdrop that includes the text "PLUS POLITICS". On the right is a man wearing a red kufi cap and a patterned dark garment with red floral designs, appearing in a video call format. The bottom of the screen displays a white banner with the text "PLUS POLITICS" and a headline stating "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". Additional text on the banner provides viewing information, including "WATCH ON DStv CH 408", "StarTimes CH 308", "WATCH ONLINE", "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV", "SUBSCRIBE WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA", and "FOLLOW US". Throughout the sequence, both men remain in their respective positions, with the man on the right speaking as his facial expressions shift slightly between frames.
